name: kkauto-skill
description: Install and update kkAuto AI-agent skills and MCP config.

scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/redaction.test.ts tests/manifest.test.ts tests/print-config.test.ts tests/doctor.test.ts tests/config-writer.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/install.test.ts tests/update.test.ts tests/antigravity.test.ts tests/mcp-wrapper.test.ts
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:security
